checklist.question: Did receivables grow materially faster than revenue across consecutive periods?

evidence.location: 8-K FDS - AR and annual revenue FY2009
8-K FDS - AR and annual revenue FY2010
10-Q balance sheet and income statement Q2 FY2011

checklist.question: Did non-current 'soft' assets (intangibles, other assets, capitalized items) grow materially faster than the business overall?
Is there a persistent divergence between net income and operating cash flow?
Do inventory levels or gross margins show trends inconsistent with revenue?

evidence.quote: SalesRevenueNet=10502000000 (FY2010) with GrossProfit=5086000000 (FY2010), margin ~48.4%; CostOfGoodsSold rose from 4962000000 (FY2009) to 5416000000 (FY2010) despite a 10.4% revenue decline

checklist.question: Is the earnings trajectory unusually smooth relative to the volatility of revenue and cash flow?

evidence.quote: NetIncomeLoss=-19000000 (Q1 FY2010, 2009-09-01/2009-11-30) vs NetIncomeLoss=887000000 (Q2 FY2010, 2009-12-01/2010-02-28) mirrors large seasonal swing in SalesRevenueNet=1697000000 (Q1) vs 3890000000 (Q2)
NetIncomeLoss=1109000000 (FY2010) down 47% from 2109000000 (FY2009), tracking a 10.4% revenue decline plus margin compression rather than being smoothed

checklist.question: Did liability, allowance, or reserve balances decline (or fail to grow) despite growing business activity?

evidence.quote: AccountsReceivableNetCurrent grew from 1556000000 (2009-08-31) to 2377000000 (2011-02-28) while the allowance fell from 162000000 to 111000000 over the same span, reducing allowance/AR coverage from ~10.4% to ~4.7%

checklist.question: Does the filing chronology show irregularities (late filings/NT forms, amendments, unusual 8-K frequency)?

evidence.quote: No NT 10-K/NT 10-Q filings appear in the chronology; 8-K/A filings occur periodically (e.g., 2009-09-15, 2010-04-07, 2010-08-31) alongside routine CORRESP/UPLOAD entries reflecting SEC comment-letter correspondence (2005, 2008, 2010, 2011), but no 10-K/A restatements are present

checklist.question: Is the provided data sufficient in coverage and length for the above assessments?

evidence.quote: Data spans FY2008 (2007-09-01/2008-08-31) through Q2 FY2011 (2010-12-01/2011-02-28), i.e., roughly 3.5 fiscal years with interim quarters, but does not include a full FY2011 annual filing given the 2011-06-28 cutoff

top_signals: Allowance for doubtful accounts declined from AllowanceForDoubtfulAccountsReceivableCurrent=162000000 (2009-08-31) to 111000000 (2011-02-28) even as AccountsReceivableNetCurrent grew from 1556000000 (2009-08-31) to 2377000000 (2011-02-28), cutting reserve coverage roughly in half

Gross margin compressed sharply from ~57.7% (FY2009: GrossProfit=6762000000/SalesRevenueNet=11724000000) to ~48.4% (FY2010: GrossProfit=5086000000/SalesRevenueNet=10502000000) with CostOfGoodsSold rising (4962000000 to 5416000000) despite a 10.4% revenue decline
Accounts receivable grew faster than revenue on an annual basis (AR +2.2% FY2009->FY2010 vs revenue -10.4%), and again in Q2 FY2011 (AR +13.6% vs revenue +6.1%)
